docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS, PLAINTIFF WILFORD NG IS PRESENT.
